texto: My heart goes out to victims and survivors of the Hurricane Katrina tragedy and to their families. This disaster will go down in history books as one of the largest natural disasters in U.S. history.
explicacao: Citação de Ellen Tauscher sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My heart goes out to victims and survivors of the Hurricane Katrina tragedy and to their families…” articula amor, heart, tragedy em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como tragedy.

texto: Preemption is the right of any nation in order to preserve its National Security; however, preemptive war is a tactic, not a strategy. When used as a strategy preemption dilutes diplomacy, creates an atmosphere of distrust, and promotes regional instability.
explicacao: Citação de Ellen Tauscher sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Preemption is the right of any nation in order to preserve its National Security; however, preemp…” articula reflexao, strategy, security em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como security e nation.

frase_original: Preemption is the right of any nation in order to preserve its National Security; however, preemptive war is a tactic, not a strategy. When used as a strategy preemption dilutes diplomacy, creates an atmosphere of distrust, and promotes regional instability.
